name: Xero
description: Sync InvoiceLeaf invoices to Xero on a schedule with contact resolution and idempotent mappings.

triggers.name: Scheduled Invoice Sync
triggers.description: Synchronize recent InvoiceLeaf invoices to Xero

actions.name: Test Xero Connection
actions.description: Verify OAuth access and tenant accessibility in Xero

xeroTenantId.title: Xero Tenant ID
xeroTenantId.description: Required when your Xero account is connected to multiple tenants.

initialSyncLookbackHours.title: Initial Sync Lookback (hours)
initialSyncLookbackHours.description: Used only until first successful run checkpoint is stored.

invoiceNumberPrefix.title: Invoice Number Prefix
invoiceNumberPrefix.description: Optional prefix added to InvoiceLeaf invoice numbers before sending to Xero.

defaultRevenueAccountCode.title: Default Revenue Account Code
defaultRevenueAccountCode.description: Optional Xero account code for receivable invoice lines.

defaultExpenseAccountCode.title: Default Expense Account Code
defaultExpenseAccountCode.description: Optional Xero account code for payable invoice lines.

configGroups.title: Mapping Defaults
configGroups.description: Invoice number and account mapping behavior
